_publications._publicationTitle: Tumor suppressor alterations cooperate to drive aggressive mesotheliomas with enriched cancer stem cells via a p53-miR-34a-c-Met axis.

_contextSnippet: MM cells grown in a spheroid assay were treated with SU11274 and SGX-523, and both inhibitors significantly reduced the size of spheroids formed without affecting cell viability... inhibition of c-Met with the less promiscuous small molecule inhibitor SGX-523, decreased the percentage of aldefluor-positive MM cells from Nf2+/−;p16/p19+/− mice in a concentration-dependent manner
details: Significantly reduced size of spheroids formed without affecting cell viability and decreased percentage of aldefluor-positive MM cells in concentration-dependent manner
